name: Medium Coiled Rope Round Basket Sleepy Bear - Cream - Cloud Island™
description:
Add an adorable touch of storage to your little one's space with this Medium Coiled Rope Round Basket Sleepy Bear from cloud island™. This round storage bin brings organization to your child's playroom or baby's nursery. Made from cream coiled rope, it features a sleepy bear face with attached ears for a cute and playful look. This sturdy basket is great for stowing almost anything — from toys to diapers to bath essentials, and is easy to spot clean.

cloud island™: Designed with love. Made without compromise.
